task:
Ticket 0039 — replace the Oscar/Bob/Deb per-agent progress bars in the launch status modal with a single spinning progress wheel plus the existing one-line status label.

FILE: packages/ui/src/renderer/sections/LaunchProgressModal.tsx

WHAT TO CHANGE:
1. Remove the three per-persona progress bars: delete the block rendering <PersonaLine .../> for oscar/bob/deb (currently lines ~114-118, the bordered box with the three PersonaLine children).
2. Delete the now-unused PersonaLine component (lines ~76-88) and the now-unused personaStatus helper (lines ~68-74). Verify with grep that nothing else references them; if PERSONAS/PersonaId/spawnStart/spawnEnd become unused, remove those too — BUT note spawnStart, spawnEnd, eventOk, eventFailed, persona, dataString, PERSONAS and PersonaId are still used by stageText/launchIsUp/launchFailure, so keep whatever remains referenced. Leave no dead code and no unused imports.
3. Replace the removed bars with a single clear spinning wheel. Use the existing Icon primitive with name='spinner' (already used in this file) rendered with a CSS spin animation, OR keep/upgrade the existing pulsing dot into an unambiguous spinner — but there must be exactly ONE spinner indicator for the whole launch, never per-agent. Keep the existing one-line status label driven by stageText(state) next to/under the spinner (e.g. spinner + 'Starting Oscar…'). Preserve the role='status' on the active (non-error) indicator and role='alert' on the error block.

MUST NOT BREAK / MUST PRESERVE:
- launchIsUp(), launchFailure(), stageText() and all their helpers must keep working unchanged in behavior — the modal still auto-closes when launchIsUp is true (handled in App.tsx polling) and still shows the error + 'Close' button on failure.
- Keep the runId mono line at the bottom and the error alert box exactly as-is.
- Do NOT change App.tsx, the LaunchProgressState interface, or the ipc-contract.
- If any test in packages/ui/tests asserts per-persona bar text (e.g. 'Bob pending', 'Deb ready', 'Starting Bob…'), update that assertion to match the spinner UI. The two known modal tests in packages/ui/tests/live-app.test.tsx ('shows live launch progress…' and 'keeps launch progress open…') assert stageText strings ('Contacting Oz daemon…', 'Starting Oscar…', 'cmux refused the pane') and the Close button — these must still pass unchanged.

EXIT CRITERIA:
- pnpm --dir packages/ui exec tsc --noEmit  (typecheck clean — no unused-var errors)
- pnpm --dir packages/ui test  (UI test suite green; live-app.test.tsx launch-modal tests pass)
Report the exact commands run, their exit codes, and the full diff of LaunchProgressModal.tsx.
